title: Sensible Stacks
body:
# Sensible Stacks Stacks that do make sense Code and idea inspired by [Why stacks of 16?](https://modrinth.com/mod/why-stacks-of-16 ) ## Synopsis This mod changes how stackable and non-stackable items stack, with balance in mind. ## Philosophy and why use this mod This mod is opinionated, which means it doesn't have that much configuration. It's made to be **sensible** — you just install the mod and get stacks that make the most sense. Most things are preconfigured: you can either enable or disable whether an item stacks to 16 (for non-stackables) or if already stackable items stack to 64. The only exception is potions. By default, potions are stackable up to 3 items per stack, because this makes the most sense to me — since you get 3 potions of the same effect from one brew in a brewing stand, and making them stack to a larger size would be somewhat unbalanced. However, since 3 is not a power of two, I made it possible for users to change how much they actually stack. ## Compatibility This mod is compatible with as many other mods as possible — this is simply how it's coded. Potions, Enchanted Books, Music Discs, and other items will stack regardless of which mod they come from. ## Table of features
Features | Item | Stack size | Default settings | |---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:| | Potions | 3 (Configurable) | Enabled | | Golden Apples (both)| 16 | Disabled | | Eggs | 64 | Enabled | | Ender Pearls | 64 | Enabled | | Snowballs | 64 | Enabled | | Honey Bottles | 64 | Enabled | | Saddles | 16 | Enabled | | Minecarts | 16 | Enabled | | Boats | 16 | Enabled | | Enchanted Books | 16 | Enabled | | Beds | 16 | Enabled | | Music Discs | 16 | Enabled |
## Contributing You are welcome to suggest new features, and you **are** welcome to hurry me up on updates. You can contact me on discord. ![kofi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be71a956eb99b7cf5ca41da1cc0df26e5f71e7e_0.webp)
